id: update-payment-intent
title: "Update payment intent"
description: "    Update a payment intent. Only allowed when status is `requires_payment_method` or `requires_confirmation`."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update payment intent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/payment-intents/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Update a payment intent. Only allowed when status is `requires_payment_method` or `requires_confirmation`.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment:write`

  as={"h2"}
